## 🧪 Type of Change

<!-- Mark the type of change with an [x] -->

- [ ] 🐛 **Bug fix** (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ **New feature** (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 **Breaking change** (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📚 **Documentation update** (improvements to documentation)
- [ ] 🧹 **Code cleanup** (refactoring, formatting, removing unused code)
- [ ] ⚡ **Performance improvement** (optimizations that improve speed/efficiency)
- [ ] 🔧 **Configuration change** (build scripts, CI/CD, package.json, etc.)
- [ ] 🧪 **Test changes** (adding or modifying tests)
- [ ] 🌐 **Localization/Translation** (language support)
- [ ] 🔒 **Security fix** (vulnerability patches, security improvements)

## ✅ Pre-Submission Checklist

<!-- Ensure all items are checked before submitting -->

### 📋 Code Quality

- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review of code completed
- [ ] Code is commented where necessary
- [ ] No console.log or debug statements left in production code
- [ ] Error handling is appropriate and consistent

### 🧪 Testing & Validation

- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] Manual testing completed on primary OS
- [ ] Cross-platform testing completed (if applicable)
- [ ] No regressions introduced
- [ ] Performance impact assessed (if applicable)

### 📚 Documentation

- [ ] README updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Code comments added for complex logic
- [ ] API documentation updated (if applicable)

### 🔒 Security & Compliance

- [ ] No sensitive information exposed
- [ ] Security implications considered
- [ ] Follows security best practices
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials

### 🚢 Release Readiness

- [ ] Version number updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Package.json updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Extension manifest updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Ready for production deployment

### 🌍 Localization (if applicable)

- [ ] All user-facing strings use localization keys
- [ ] Updated base localization file (`l10n/bundle.l10n.json`)
- [ ] Tested with different language settings
- [ ] Considered cultural implications

---

**📋 Reviewer Guidelines:**

- Focus on code quality, security, and user experience
- Test on your primary development environment
- Verify that the implementation matches the requirements
- Check for potential edge cases or error scenarios

**✋ For Maintainers:**

- Ensure CI/CD passes before merging
- Verify changelog and version updates
- Test extension packaging if applicable
- Update project documentation if needed
